title: Stackable Absorption│可堆疊吸收
description: Absorption effects can be stacked to achieve higher absorption.│吸收效果可堆疊，從而獲得更高的吸收值。
body:
> **"The absorption effect is similar to the shield mechanism in many games, but unlike shields in other games, this effect cannot be stacked, which is strange."**  
> 
> **"吸收效果就相當於許多遊戲中的護甲機制，但是這個效果卻不像其他遊戲的護甲能堆疊，真奇怪。"**
# Function│功能
If a mob gains another absorption effect while already having one, the absorption effect level will be set to **the original effect level** + **the level of the newly gained effect**; if the remaining time of the newly gained effect is greater than the remaining time of the original effect, the remaining time of the newly gained effect will overwrite the remaining time of the original effect.│如果生物在已有吸收效果時再次獲得吸收效果，吸收效果等級將會設為 **原效果的等級** + **該次獲得效果的等級** ；若該次獲得效果的剩餘時間大於原效果的剩餘時間，以該次獲得效果的剩餘時間覆蓋原效果的剩餘時間。
